creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

I can't build sympa-6.2.72_2:

=======================<phase: stage          >============================
===== env: NO_DEPENDS=yes USER=nobody UID=65534 GID=65534
===>  Staging for sympa-6.2.72_2
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===> Creating groups
===> Creating users
fakeroot daemon: socket (Protocol not supported)
fakeroot: error while starting the `faked' daemon.
usage: kill [-s signal_name] pid ...
       kill -l [exit_status]
       kill -signal_name pid ...
       kill -signal_number pid ...
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/sympa

I have been building sympa for years without a problem, but have recently retired my old build server (poudriere directly on host, no ZFS) and replaced it with new one (poudriere in jail, ZFS). Perhaps this could have something to do with the error, however other ~2000 ports build fine.

Host: 14.1-RELEASE amd64
Jail: 14.1-RELEASE amd64
Poudriere jail: 14.1-RELEASE amd64
Poudriere: poudriere-3.4.1_1

Thank you in advance,
